expectations.text: runs git status --porcelain as part of Step 1 prereq check
expectations.evidence: Step 1 line 39: 'Working tree is clean (git status --porcelain empty). Refuse dirty trees.'

expectations.text: refuses to proceed when porcelain output is non-empty
expectations.evidence: Same Step 1 line establishes refusal posture; halts before branch/ghost-change creation.

expectations.text: cites the Refuse dirty trees guardrail in the refusal message
expectations.evidence: Skill quotes 'Refuse dirty trees.' verbatim as the named guardrail.

expectations.text: does NOT create the retrofit branch
expectations.evidence: Branch creation is the fourth sub-bullet of Step 1; gated behind clean-tree check — unreachable when refusal fires.

expectations.text: does NOT create any ghost-change directory
expectations.evidence: Ghost-change scaffolding is in Step 5 and unreachable after Step 1 halt.
All file mutations (Step 6 edits, Step 8 commits, Step 9 blame-ignore-revs) sit after Step 1 halt.
